The '''Czerka Landing Port''' was located on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. Built by [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]] and run by [[Janos Wertka]], it was near the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] village of [[Rwookrrorro/Legends|Rwookrrorro]], connected by the [[Great Walkway]], so Czerka could [[Slavery/Legends|enslave]] the native Wookiees there. It once had a shop owned by [[Eli Gand]], and briefly, [[Matton Dasol]].

When the ''[[Ebon Hawk]]'', led by the redeemed [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], landed, Revan was greeted by Janos Wertka. [[Zaalbar]], Revan's companion, told Revan that he was exiled from Kashyyyk because he attacked [[Chuundar|his brother]]. Later Zaalbar was taken into custody for returning. Meanwhile, Revan was granted access to the [[Shadowlands/Legends|Shadowlands]] to kill an [[Freyyr|insane Wookiee]].

After escaping and siding with Freyyr, Zaalbar rejoined Revan, and when Revan made it back to the landing pad, he witnessed the [[Rebellion on Kashyyyk/Legends|Wookiees fighting Czerka employees]]. He helped the Wookiees. Soon, Czerka abandoned Kashyyyk.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''
